tasks.name: AINews_Test
prompts: STEP 1 - Search the web for recent AI news. Try several different search queries until you have at least 5 article URLs - for example: 'AI news today', 'artificial intelligence latest', 'machine learning research this week'. If one query returns no results, try the next without stopping. STEP 2 - For each article URL collected, delegate a sub-task. Each delegate should: decide if the article is substantive AI news (KEEP) or a link aggregator / landing page with no substance (DISCARD); if KEEP, fetch and translate the content into markdown and save to a scratchpad key, then return that key. STEP 3 - For each scratchpad key returned from the delegates, compose a daily briefing report with de-duplicated content and save to webresearch/02-Analyse/{today}/ai_daily.md.
